rows.label: tev026201_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev026201_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Nelly about the restricted hangar.

rows.label: tev026201_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev026201_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Nelly if anything is troubling her.

rows.label: tev026201_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Nelly about the Doll found in Nightglow Forest.

rows.label: tev026201_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Nelly about the Doll stolen during the attack.

rows.label: tev026201_SEL4021
rows.name: Ask Nelly about recent developments.

rows.label: tev026201_SEL6011
rows.name: Ask Nelly about the fish on Mira.

rows.label: tev026201_SEL6021
rows.name: Ask Nelly about recent developments.

rows.label: tev026201_MSG0001
rows.name:
Not even I know what's in there,
and we're the ones who are
supposed to be guarding it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026201_MSG0002
rows.name:
You think it's some big new weapon,
maybe? Or a relic they found on Mira?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026201_MSG0003
rows.name:
All I know is that I'm supposed to
guard it with my life, so it must
be crucial to human survival.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026201_MSG0004
rows.name:
Well, they picked the right Companion for
the job. Nobody's getting past me! Not even
you, [ST:gender p1=buster p2=sister ]! Two steps back! Right now! Hup![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026201_MSG0009
rows.name:
One of my fellow Companion said he's
really into me and wants us to be a thing.
I...don't know how I feel about that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026201_MSG0010
rows.name:
I mean, we're in the middle of a crisis, right? It
would feel really weird to be dating and...stuff.
Anyway, I've kind of been keeping him hanging.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026201_MSG0011
rows.name:
...Oh, don't get me wrong! I
like him, I really do. I mean,
I really, REALLY like him. Hee![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026201_MSG0012
rows.name:
But I just don't know if I
can balance a love life with
my work life. It's tough.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026201_MSG0017
rows.name:
I saw that alien Doll when they
put it in the restricted hangar.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026201_MSG0018
rows.name:
It didn't look like it would be
operational anytime soon. To be honest,
it struck me as kind of underwhelming.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026201_MSG0019
rows.name:
Think the Growth yoinked the wrong superweapon?
I mean, we all make mistakes. Hell, I bought
men's deodorant by accident once.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026201_MSG0024
rows.name:
I think it's safe to say it must be important
to them, considering the number of troops
they expended on getting it back.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026201_MSG0025
rows.name:
Our investigative team didn't find anything special
about it, but hey, who knows. The thing might possess
unimaginable power that we just can't...um...imagine.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026201_MSG0026
rows.name:
It might even be like their
version of the Lifepoint.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026201_MSG0027
rows.name:
For all we know, something
essential to their survival was
hiding in there and we missed it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026201_MSG1001
rows.name:
Hey, that ball of honeysmoke
you suggested added just the
right kick to my cooking![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026201_MSG1002
rows.name:
I added a tablespoonful as a secret spice, and it gave
my stew this sweet fragrance, but also a bit of sour.
It really brought out the umami of the ingredients.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026201_MSG1003
rows.name:
...I've always wanted to say umami.
I feel like such a pro chef now![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026201_MSG1004
rows.name:
Even my boyfriend said he likes my
cooking more than ever. Isn't he sweet?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026201_MSG1005
rows.name:
Anyway, you should try
it. You won't be sorry![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026201_MSG2001
rows.name:
Hey! That high-temperature pot you
suggested was a complete disaster![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026201_MSG2002
rows.name:
I thought it would be great to have
a pan that never cools down...until
I started cooking with it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026201_MSG2003
rows.name:
It accumulated so much heat that I
couldn't even touch it with an oven mitt![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026201_MSG2004
rows.name:
I finally used tongs to wrestle it
into a cabinet, where it promptly
MELTED INTO PLACE. I kid you not.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026201_MSG2005
rows.name:
In the end, I had to ask my friend
to rip the whole cabinet out with his
Doll and bury it. Yep. Seriously.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026201_MSG2006
rows.name:
"High-temperature pot"? Pfft! They should call
it the "ALWAYS Hot Pot!" Get it? Because it
won't... Look, Lu needs to pay for my new cabinet![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026201_MSG3001
rows.name:
Hey there! That electric hammock
you suggested has changed my life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026201_MSG3002
rows.name:
Get this: I ran out of ingredients, so
I took the hammock out to the water and
tried using it as a fishing net.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026201_MSG3003
rows.name:
This, as it turns out, was GENIUS.
I raked in more seafood than a
baleen whale at a salmon run![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026201_MSG3004
rows.name:
Then I told my friend, and she introduced me
to some xeno buyers who are willing to pay
way more than I make from BLADE missions.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026201_MSG3005
rows.name:
Well, I know an opportunity when I smell one.
I ditched my low-income hangnail of a boyfriend
and started doing daily fishing trips.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026201_MSG3006
rows.name:
In fact, I'm weeks—maybe even
days—away from developing a fishing
Doll. And I owe it all to you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026201_MSG3007
rows.name:
That fancy downtown house I've
always dreamed about is finally
within reach. Suck it, BLADE![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026201_MSG4001
rows.name:
I never would have dreamed that
honeysmoke could add so much oomph
to my cooking. It's incredible![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026201_MSG4002
rows.name:
My boyfriend is so head over heels
for it that he PROPOSED to me the
other day. Can you imagine?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026201_MSG4003
rows.name:
And I owe it all to you and Lu for
coming up with it. You're the best![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026201_MSG5001
rows.name:
Add that to life experiences I never
thought I'd have: bashing in a wall
of my room to extract a saucepan.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026201_MSG5002
rows.name:
I told my friend to bury the darned thing
deep, but I hear the soil there has risen
to, shall we say, "toasty" temperatures...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026201_MSG5003
rows.name:
Seriously, why did you recommend that
thing? Were you trying to kill us all?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026201_MSG5004
rows.name:
I swear, Lu is going to pay for the
repairs if it's the last thing I do.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026201_MSG6001
rows.name:
The other day, when I was out fishing,
I accidentally pulled up a fish-like
indigen called a "duoguill."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026201_MSG6002
rows.name:
I guess they really like electricity, because the
electric hammock made the thing feistier than a dog
in a squeeze-toy factory. I couldn't keep it still![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026201_MSG6003
rows.name:
Darned thing burned all the
other fish I caught to ash.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026201_MSG6004
rows.name:
So if you ever run into one,
whatever you do, don't hit
it with electric attacks![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026201_MSG6009
rows.name:
Once I finish developing my fishing Doll,
I'll be taking home enough fish to make
my current haul pale in comparison.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026201_MSG6010
rows.name:
After that, it's just a matter of watching my
income skyrocket and building a personal fleet
of ships. Oh, and a fancy corporate HQ...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev026201_MSG6011
rows.name:
I've got big dreams, baby! And I owe it all
to Lu and his electric hammock. There aren't
enough words in the world to thank you both![ST:wait ]
